programme.title: We the People With Judge Lauren Lake

programme.title: Justice for the People With Judge Milian

programme.title: La reina del flow

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Live: MLB Now
programme.desc: The hourlong weekday afternoon "MLB Now" presents the day's top stories in baseball by spanning the sport's cultural divide. The series also features interviews with personalities throughout the game, and viewer opinions are welcome as well via social media polls.

programme.title: MLB Central
programme.desc: MLB Network's first-ever regular-season morning show features hosts Robert Flores, Mark DeRosa and Lauren Shehadi reporting from Studio 21, named in honor of Hall of Famer and humanitarian Roberto Clemente. programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Tensions run high as the queens return to discuss the drama of the season; both America's Next Drag Superstar and Miss Congeniality are crowned.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: A mystery queen joins the nine competitors; the first test is a drag variety show.

programme.title: RuPaul's All Stars Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens perform in a lip-syncing dance number inspired by the classic TV special "VH1 Divas Live"; featuring guest judge Vanessa Williams and choreographer Todrick Hall.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: Testing the queens' improvisation skills in an unscripted dating show; Constance Zimmer and Jeffrey Bowyer-Chapman guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The queens impersonate celebrities in a quick-witted TV game show; fashion designer Marc Jacobs stops by the workroom; Kristin Chenoweth and Nicole Byer guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: Designing wearable soup cans inspired by Andy Warhol; creating Studio 54 disco looks; Tituss Burgess and Shay Mitchell guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The eliminated queens return to the competition for revenge, but first the queens must audition for RuPaul's new girl group, the Kitty Girls; Spice Girl Emma Bunton (Baby Spice) and Adam Lambert guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The queens' acting chops are put to the test in a girl comedy blockbuster scene; House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) stops by the workroom; Chris Colfer and Garcelle Beauvais guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race: All Stars
programme.desc: The queens must write and perform a rap on RuPaul's new hit single and conquer a one-take choreography performance; before a winner can be crowned, RuPaul invites the eliminated queens to weigh in.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants must reinvent their looks using thrift-store clothing and trinkets from the dollar store; guest judge Bob Mackie helps weed out the least-stylish drag queen.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants split into two rival musical groups, trying to impress RuPaul and guest judge Michelle Williams with their lip-synching skills.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants' tasks include being a newscaster, product spokesperson and talk-show host to RuPaul and guest judge Debra Wilson.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants make screen tests for a cosmetics company; model Jenny Shimizu helps judge the contestants' drag-queen status.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants transform a group of female extreme fighters into their drag daughters.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contenstants hit the dance floor at a drag ball.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Looking back on the highlights, lowlights and previously unseen footage from the first six episodes ahead of the climactic grand finale.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Tensions mount as the queens return to discuss dramas of the season.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The contestants reunite to discuss what has happened since the competition ended.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A new cast of queens compete to be crowned America's Next Drag Superstar and must show off their performance skills in a talent show; actress Charlize Theron guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: A new cast of queens compete to be crowned America's Next Drag Superstar.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens put their design skills to the test in a pageant of mother-inspired couture.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Queens compete in a drag parody of Saturday Night Live, performing comedic sketches with guest judge Sarah Michelle Gellar.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must write and perform their own verses for RuPaul songs from his new album.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: After a flamenco dance with Spanish sensation Charo, the queens must design their own dolls.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: This season's Rusical is set high in the Swish Alps, as a young queen called Mariah goes in search of a musical outlet for her inner freak; director Adam Shankman guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: After the Reading challenge, the queens impersonate celebrities in a classic quick-fire comedy game show; All Stars' winner Chad Michaels drops by the werkroom; actress Kyra Sedgwick guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Morticia meets Mugler as the queens create a Neo-Goth look from scratch, using only black, white and gray fabric; model and actress Kaia Gerber guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens let their voices be heard in an inspirational political anthem and exercise their right to shake their groove thing; Choreographer Jamal Sims "Aladdin" guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must devise and present comical Drag Awareness seminars, in front of a live audience of bored corporate employees; actor and comedian Joel Kim Booster guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens star in the hot new design show called Bathroom Hunties, decorating and showcasing over-the-top powder rooms.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Male dancers from the "RuPaul's Drag Race Live" show in Las Vegas drop by the werkroom to be made over into drag queens; country star Kelsea Ballerini guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens dig deep to write their memoirs, pose for a book cover photo shoot, and get grilled by podcaster Matt Rogers.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: All of the eliminated queens return to battle it out in a LipSync Lalaparuza Smackdown, with nine lip syncs, and a cash prize of $50,000 on the line.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The top queens face off in an epic evening of performances and lip syncs, as they compete for the title of America's Next Drag Superstar and a grand prize of $200,000.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: From fabulous divas to outrageous flops, RuPaul gives a behind-the-scenes look at casting for Drag Race.

programme.desc: The contestants go head to head with guest judges.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.desc: Jack loses his hosting job and vows never to return to acting; Will has a showdown with his father.

programme.title: Will & Grace

programme.desc: Judge James Hardy (Lewis Stone), wife Emily, daughter Marian (Cecilia Parker), and son Andy (Mickey Rooney) prepare for their annual vacation. Marian flirts with a wealthy lifeguard who claims to be separated from his wife, and Andy is drawn to an equally wealthy "fast" girl. But the Hardys'

programme.title: Flipper
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, local 12-year-old boy Sandy Ricks (Luke Halpin) comes across a dolphin that has been pierced by a harpoon. Rushing to help the poor animal, Ricks saves the dolphin's life, cares for it until it regains its health and names it Flipper. programme.title: The Incredible Mr. Limpet
programme.desc: Aquatic life fanatic Henry Limpet (Don Knotts) falls into the sea and transforms into a fish, quickly becoming pals with a crab and developing a romantic bond with a fetching female fish. As a human, Henry was passed over for naval service. But now that he's a fish, he seeks out his friend Lt. George Stickel (Jack Weston). Finding him on a small boat in the Atlantic, Henry explains that he can ale

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: When the draft selects rock star Conrad Birdie, his fans are devastated, but none more than struggling songwriter Albert Peterson (Dick Van Dyke), whose song Birdie was just about to record. Albert's longtime girlfriend, Rosie (Janet Leigh), pushes Albert to write a new tune that Birdie will perform on television to a fan selected in a contest. The scheme works, with young Ohio teenager Kim McAfee

programme.title: The Cincinnati Kid
programme.desc: Young poker player Eric Stoner (Steve McQueen), also known as the Cincinnati Kid, wants to build his reputation by beating the best player around, Lancey The Man Howard (Edward G. Robinson). Through Stoner's friend, Shooter (Karl Malden), a game with Howard is scheduled. programme.title: Once a Thief
programme.desc: All ex-convict Eddie Pedak (Alain Delon) wants is a fresh start with his wife, Kristine (Ann-Margret), and daughter, Kathy (Tammy Locke), as he tries to rebuild his life in San Francisco, but a few obstacles stand in his way. programme.title: Made in Paris
programme.desc: A fashion buyer (Ann-Margret) sent to Paris attracts a charmer (Louis Jourdan), a newsman (Richard Crenna) and her boss' son.

programme.title: Lovely to Look At
programme.desc: In this musical, Broadway producers Tony Naylor (Howard Keel), Al Marsh (Red Skelton) and Jerry Ralby (Gower Champion) are having difficulty securing funds for their latest show. Then Al learns he has inherited half of a salon in Paris from his Aunt Roberta. The three men travel to France, where they attempt to stage an extravagant fashion show to revitalize the struggling business, now run by Rob

programme.title: Stronger Than Desire
programme.desc: A blackmailer's (Lee Bowman) widow stands trial for his murder, defended by a lawyer (Walter Pidgeon) whose own wife (Virginia Bruce) is guilty.

programme.title: The Witness Chair
programme.desc: A woman (Ann Harding) watches as false murder-trial evidence surrounds the man (Walter Abel) she loves.

programme.title: Midnight Alibi
programme.desc: An old spinster (Helen Lowell) lies to save a nightclub gambler (Richard Barthelmess) accused of killing a mobster.

programme.title: Confession
programme.desc: Lisa (Jane Bryan) finds herself being forcefully wooed by Michael Michailow (Basil Rathbone), a concert pianist many years her senior. In a nightclub, she finally succumbs to a kiss, and the sight causes the cabaret singer, Vera Kowalska (Kay Francis), to faint. As Michael attempts to beat a hasty retreat, Vera shoots him. When Vera has her day in court, she initially refuses to testify. But event

programme.title: A Criminal Is Born
programme.desc: Four youths, neglected by their parents, are tempted to turn to crime.

programme.title: Criminal Court
programme.desc: A wily candidate for district attorney defends his fiancée charged with murder.

programme.title: Criminal Lawyer
programme.desc: A tricky trial lawyer (Pat O'Brien) takes to drink when a bar association refuses to back him for judge.

programme.title: Bordertown
programme.desc: After the L.A. judicial system disbars him following an angry outburst, recent law-school graduate Johnny Ramirez (Paul Muni) finds a job at a small casino south of the border. When Johnny's creative ideas help transform the failing casino into a high-class operation, the owner (Eugene Pallette) makes him the co-owner. But the owner's obsessive wife, Marie (Bette Davis), falls in love with Johnny,

programme.title: Count the Hours
programme.desc: A court-appointed lawyer (Macdonald Carey) races to save an innocent migrant worker from being executed.

programme.title: Trial
programme.desc: When Mexican-American Angel Chavez (Rafael Campos) is arrested for murder on weak evidence, David Blake (Glenn Ford) agrees to defend him to gain the courtroom experience necessary for law school tenure. Bernard Castle (Arthur Kennedy) runs the law firm paying Blake's expenses. While Bernard takes care of fundraising, Blake prepares for trial with alluring secretary Abbe (Dorothy McGuire) but soon

programme.title: The Rainmaker
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a drought is wreaking havoc on a small, destitute Kansas town. Bill Starbuck (Burt Lancaster), a slick grifter, arrives in town, promising he can make it rain in exchange for $100. His offer is accepted by H. C. Curry (Cameron Prudhomme), a rancher whose spinster daughter, Lizzie (Katharine Hepburn), is desperate for a suitor. Lizzie finally finds confidence when Starb

programme.title: Miracle in the Rain
programme.desc: Ruth Wood (Jane Wyman) is a lonely secretary taking care of her ailing, depressed mother (Josephine Hutchinson) in New York City during World War II. While she's walking in Central Park, a surprise rainstorm leads to her meeting Arthur Hugenon (Van Johnson), a young soldier from Tennessee. The two strike up a whirlwind romance, but Arthur is sent overseas and killed. Distraught and inconsolable, R

programme.title: The Rain People
programme.desc: Upon learning that she's pregnant, housewife Natalie Ravenna (Shirley Knight) leaves her husband and embarks on a road trip of self-discovery. But, as she later learns when she meets a lovelorn police officer named Gor

programme.title: Singin' in the Rain
programme.desc: A spoof of the turmoil that afflicted the movie industry in the late 1920s when movies went from silent to sound. When two silent movie stars', Don Lockwood and Lina Lamont, latest movie is made into a musical a chorus girl is brought in to dub Lina's speaking and singing. Don is on top of the world until Lina finds out.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: In the South Pacific, the passengers of a boat must disembark prematurely at the island of Pago Pago due to a cholera scare. Among them are missionaries Alfred Davidson (Walter Huston) and his wife (Beulah Bondi), and a spirited prostitute, Sadie Thompson (Joan Crawford). On the island, Thompson lives it up with the American soldiers stationed in the village, and captures the heart of Sgt. Tim O'H

programme.title: Obliging Young Lady
programme.desc: Precocious young Bridget Potter (Joan Carroll) is sent to an island resort with Linda Norton (Ruth Warrick), an employee of her father's lawyer. The two pretend to be sisters to avoid publicity regarding the impending divorce of Bridget's parents. Also vacationing at the resort is Red Reddy (Edmond O'Brien), a writer who had a brief chat with Linda and has become obsessed with her. When Linda's je

programme.title: One for the Book
programme.desc: Sally Middleton (Eleanor Parker) is an actress who swears off love when her boyfriend (Kent Smith) ends their relationship. Meanwhile, her friend Olive Lashbrooke (Eve Arden) has no problem with finding dates -- and sometimes has too many. When Olive is supposed to meet Sgt. Bill Page (Ronald Reagan) at Sally's apartment, she stands him up in favor of a commander (Wayne Morris). With nowhere to go

programme.title: Pan-Americana
programme.desc: In this romantic musical, American travel writer Jo Anne Benson (Audrey Long) is headed to South America to find new stories with photographer Dan Jordan (Phillip Terry) in tow. While Jo Anne plans to use the trip to reconnect with her fiancé, Charlie (Robert Benchley), Dan is eager use this opportunity to get to know Jo Anne better. While chasing down intriguing stories, the co-workers take in a

programme.title: She Couldn't Say No
programme.desc: Corporate lawyer Wallace Turnbull (Roger Pryor) travels to a small town to convince local curmudgeon Eli Potter (Clem Bevans) to sell his land to Turnbull's client. programme.title: Stage Door
programme.desc: A boardinghouse for female theater actresses gets a new arrival in the form of Terry Randall (Katharine Hepburn), an upper-class woman pursuing her dreams against her wealthy father's wishes. At first, her status makes her unpopular with the other boarders, particularly her roommate, Jean (Ginger Rogers). As Terry becomes better acquainted with the other girls and their shared ambitions, rivalry -

programme.title: That Uncertain Feeling
programme.desc: Jill Baker (Merle Oberon) has an incurable case of the hiccups, for which she reluctantly agrees to see a psychologist, Dr. Vengard (Alan Mowbray). During her first visit she realizes her hiccups may be related to nerves about her husband, Larry (Melvyn Douglas). programme.title: The Unfaithful
programme.desc: A woman stands trial for killing the man who had been her lover while her husband was away.

programme.title: Ziegfeld Girl
programme.desc: During the 1920s, three New York girls pursue careers performing in the iconic Ziegfeld Follies. Susan (Judy Garland) is a vaudeville performer who desires nothing more than a shot at the big time. programme.desc: Widow Aurora Greenway (Shirley MacLaine) and her daughter, Emma (Debra Winger), have a strong bond, but Emma marries teacher Flap Horton (Jeff Daniels) against her mother's wishes. programme.title: Urban Cowboy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke heads to the city of Bangalore in southern India; he visits MTR, one of the oldest coffee houses in the city; he learns how to make idli; he meets up with a friend to explore the night markets.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke learns about Kongunadu cuisine in Coimbatore, partners with a family in Thrissur to create an authentic delicacy and learns about India's rich coffee culture.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the port city of Kochi, Kerala, where he checks out the iconic Chinese fishing nets, does laundry the old-fashioned way and cooks a famous dish. He leaves the city to witness the state's backwaters and local fishing techniques.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits the lush plantations of spices in Thekkady and then tours Madurai, the spiritual heart of Tamil Nadu, to find hidden gems with the help of a local food journalist.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke uncovers the history of Chettinad and savours its famous cuisine. He then tastes the chutneys in Kumbakonam and explores the exciting food scene in Pondicherry.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's India
programme.desc: Luke visits Chennai, the capital of Tamil Nadu, a bustling city with historic ancient temples, and a vibrant modern art scene.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: TV and radio host Dermot O'Leary takes Fred Sirieix to Puglia in Italy's deep South to his favourite restaurants showcasing simple but sublime cucina povera or poor man's cooking.

programme.title: Extraordinary Places to Eat
programme.desc: Pastry Chef Ravneet Gill takes Fred to Mallorca to experience incredible island cooking, from a buzzing beach bar serving holiday food in the sun, to light and fluffy pastries.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: Disturbed by the fact that his hometown of Windsor, Ontario is typically overlooked on lists of the top pizza cities in the world, George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gino & Fred are excited to head to San Francisco for their very own Summer of Love. Gordon tries to embrace the flower power mood, but he's more interested in the 61 Michelin Stars. The boys travel to a Napa Valley vineyard in a hot air balloon.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: After four weeks on the road, Gino's airing his feet in the back seat as the guys cruise along a Texan highway. Texas is a meat lover's paradise, and Gordon is keen to show the Europhiles some of the best BBQ known to man.
